allow: PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Id \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3002 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Puertos liberados")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); p=[r for r in d if r['status']=='PENDING']; print\('PENDIENTES:',len\(p\), [r['product']['name'] for r in p]\)")

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { Write-Output "Matando PID $\($p.Id\) \($\($p.ProcessName\)\)"; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force } } } else { Write-Output "Puerto 3001 libre" })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Cerrado PID $\($_.OwningProcess\)" } } else { Write-Output "Puerto 3001 libre" })

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(d\)} promociones'\); [print\(f\\" - {p['name']}: {p['discountType']} {p['discountValue']} | producto={p.get\('productId'\)} categoria={p.get\('category'\)} activa={p['isActive']} vence={p['endDate'][:10]}\\"\) for p in d[:6]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(d\)} productos'\); [print\(f\\" - {p['name'][:28]:28} | cat={p['category']:12} | S/. {p['price']}\\"\) for p in d[:5]]")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/promotions -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name":"Prueba 20% Ropa","description":"Promo de prueba","discountType":"PERCENTAGE","discountValue":20,"category":"Ropa","startDate":"__CMDSUB_OUTPUT__","endDate":"__TRACKED_VAR__","createdBy":"Test"}' -w '\\n[HTTP %{http_code}]\\n')
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\" - {p['name']}: {p['discountValue']}% cat={p.get\('category'\)} activa={p['isActive']}\\"\) for p in d]")

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Output "puerto liberado" } else { Write-Output "puerto libre" })
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f\\" {p['name']}: {p['discountValue']}% activa={p['isActive']} \(debe seguir True\)\\"\)")

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; Write-Output "listo")
